name: node-chokidar
title: node-chokidar
summary: minimal and efficient cross-platform file-watching library
description:
minimal and efficient cross-platform file-watching library
chokidar v4 is a complete rewrite that drops most of the optional
dependencies of v3. It now only relies on readdirp (bundled in this
package as a component).
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-chokidar because minimal and efficient cross-platform file-watching library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-chokidar as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-chokidar with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-chokidar --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
